subcodes.title: Words to Genevieve Coy et al, spoken on 1920-09-08
subcodes.first_line: it is not the length of time that one spends here that is important. Some people stay a short time, and then go and do great service. Other people are here a long time, and they learn nothing.
subcodes.subjects: @humor; jokes, @personal instructions, @development of capacity and readiness
